title: バクシン的トレーニング……？

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Desiring a speed fast enough to reign victorious
over Nishino Flower, Sakura Bakushin O continues
her training.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While she suspects that I'm trying to make her a
sprinter...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sakura Bakushin O shakes off her doubts and
continues to trust in me! Onward to victory!
